_comment: YouTube publishing configuration. Controls upload behavior, defaults, and account requirements. Runtime toggles are read from n8n Variables. Workflows reference this config as the canonical documentation for YouTube upload settings.

upload._comment_enabled: Set ENABLE_YOUTUBE_UPLOAD=true in n8n Variables to activate YouTube video uploads.
upload._comment_visibility: Override per-video with youtube_metadata.visibility. Set YOUTUBE_DEFAULT_VISIBILITY in n8n Variables to change the default.
upload._comment_category_id: YouTube category ID. 25 = News & Politics. Set YOUTUBE_CATEGORY_ID in n8n Variables to override.
upload._comment_made_for_kids: COPPA compliance flag. Set to false for news/finance content.

retry._comment: Retry settings for YouTube Data API upload calls. Exponential backoff recommended in practice.

upload_flow._comment_method: Uses the YouTube Data API v3 resumable upload protocol for reliability with large video files.
upload_flow._comment_max_file: Maximum expected file size in MB. YouTube supports up to 256 GB but daily videos are typically 10-60 MB.
upload_flow._comment_timeout: Upload timeout in seconds. Increase for very large files or slow connections.

metadata_source.title: youtube_metadata.title
metadata_source._comment: Metadata fields are sourced from the youtube_metadata object generated by module 07 (Generate YouTube Metadata). The AI produces these fields following the youtube_metadata JSON schema.

video_json_fields.youtube_video_id: Same as video_id, kept for explicit naming
video_json_fields._comment: Both fields are written to video.json by module 16 (Update Video Reference) after a successful upload. The frontend VideoEmbed component reads video_id to render the YouTube iframe embed.

account_requirements._comment_auth: YouTube uploads require OAuth 2.0 user authentication (not API key). Create credentials in Google Cloud Console and configure in n8n as an OAuth2 credential.
account_requirements._comment_quota: Each video upload costs 1600 units of the daily 10,000 unit quota. Plan for max ~6 uploads/day with the default quota. Request a quota increase for higher volume.
